questions.question: What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "compare"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "comparison"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "bigger"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "smaller"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "better"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "worse"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "best"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "worst"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "expensive"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "cheaper"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "faster"?
What is the Vietnamese meaning of the word "slower"?
Choose the best word: Traffic is _____ on Mondays.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Traffic is worse on Mondays." — từ đúng là "worse" (tệ hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: She is the _____ student.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "She is the best student." — từ đúng là "best" (tốt nhất).

questions.question: Choose the best word: That was the _____ film ever.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "That was the worst film ever." — từ đúng là "worst" (tệ nhất).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Gold is more _____ than silver.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Gold is more expensive than silver." — từ đúng là "expensive" (đắt).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The bus is _____ than a taxi.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The bus is cheaper than a taxi." — từ đúng là "cheaper" (rẻ hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: A plane is _____ than a train.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A plane is faster than a train." — từ đúng là "faster" (nhanh hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: A turtle is _____ than a rabbit.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "A turtle is slower than a rabbit." — từ đúng là "slower" (chậm hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: He is _____ than his brother.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "He is taller than his brother." — từ đúng là "taller" (cao hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: This road is _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "This road is shorter." — từ đúng là "shorter" (ngắn/thấp hơn).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The two cars are _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The two cars are similar." — từ đúng là "similar" (tương tự).

questions.question: Choose the best word: The twins are quite _____.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "The twins are quite different." — từ đúng là "different" (khác nhau).

questions.question: Choose the best word: Football is the most _____ sport.
questions.explanation: Câu hoàn chỉnh: "Football is the most popular sport." — từ đúng là "popular" (phổ biến).

questions.question: Complete the sentence: An elephant is ___ than a dog.
Complete the sentence: This is the ___ film I've ever seen.
Complete the sentence: Maths is ___ than English for me.
Complete the sentence: She is the ___ student in class.
Complete the sentence: Today is ___ than yesterday.
questions.explanation: Short adjective comparative doubles the consonant.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: A car is ___ expensive than a bike.
questions.explanation: Use 'more' for comparative of long adjectives.

questions.question: Complete the sentence: This is the ___ book in the shop.
Complete the sentence: My bag is ___ as yours.
Complete the sentence: Traffic is ___ on Mondays.
Complete the sentence: Russia is the ___ country in the world.
Which English word means "so sánh"?
Which English word means "sự so sánh"?
questions.explanation: "sự so sánh" trong tiếng Anh là "comparison".

questions.question: Which English word means "to hơn"?
Which English word means "nhỏ hơn"?
Which English word means "tốt hơn"?
Which English word means "tệ hơn"?
